titleStmt.title: SII 24.264: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 264. (A.R. No. 361 of 1953-54.) WALL BEHIND THE ĀCHCHĀVAYYAṈ SHRINE, TO THE EAST OF MĒṬṬAḺAGIYA-ŚIṄGAR SHRINE.

summary.p: Partly covered up by the floor. Records a grant of land by Paramēśvaraṉ Nārāyaṇaṉ of Aḷiyappaḍambil, a Kudiraichcheṭṭi of Malaimaṇḍalam after purchasing the same from Pagaivali Aṇukku-Nambi alias Uṟaṅgāvilli of Eḍavūr. The record is dated in the 22nd regnal year of king Sōmēśvara and the details of the date viz. Vṛiśchika, ba. 6, Monday, Pūśam correspond regularly to A.D. 1252, November 2, Monday, ·30; ·25.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīḥ sārvvabhaumaccakravartti pocaḷa śrī vīrasomeśvaradevarkku yāṇṭu 2 10 2 vatu vṛścikanāyaṟṟu
Aparapakṣattu ṣaṣṭhiyum tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa pūcattu nāḷ malaimaṇṭalattuk kutirai ceṭṭikaḷil
Aḷiyappaṭampil parameśvaraṉ nārāyaṇaṉeṉ tiruvaraṅkattiruppati śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷil Eṭavūr Uṟaṅkāvi
lviyāṉa pakaivali Aṇukku nampi pakkal ṉāṉ vilaikoṇṭuṭaiya tirunantavanattu mipārkellai paccaivāra
ṇatātar tirunantavanattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai periya koyil piriyar viḷai nilattukku teṟkum kiḻpār
kellai śrīrāmanātar maṇ vāl niḷattukku meṟkkum tiruva nilattukku vaṭakkum naṭuvupaṭṭa vaḻi Uṭpaṭa kuḻi
ṉūṟṟu Eṇpatu Itil meṟkaṭaya nāṉ koṇṭa kuḻi toṇṇūṟum mutal kaik koṇṭu nāḷ � The rest is covered up by floor.
Digital edition of SII 24.264 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
